mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, icon_url, status, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM circle WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO circle (name, description, icon_url, status, sort_order) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{iconUrl}, #{status}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE circle SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, icon_url = #{iconUrl}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
